overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a lakeside dirt path at night under overcast skies. The character travels through grassy hills toward a distant medieval castle town, eventually crossing a wooden bridge over the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside dirt trail through rolling grassy hills

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path beside the lake, surrounded by grassy hills and scattered trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grass
calm lake water reflecting the overcast sky
rolling green hills with patches of dirt
tall evergreen trees lining the lakeshore
white-barked trees scattered on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through open grassy hills beside a calm lake. The overcast night sky creates a moody blue-gray atmosphere, with pine and birch trees scattered across the landscape. The path curves gently through the terrain with no other characters or structures in sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lakeside approach with distant medieval settlement

events.description: medieval castle town becomes visible in the distance across the water
moon breaks through clouds, casting pale light on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the path toward the distant castle town, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: fortified stone settlement with towers and walls visible across the water
long wooden bridge extending over the water toward the town
tall stone watchtower on the distant shore

segments.scene_description: As the path curves, a medieval castle town comes into view across the lake, with a wooden bridge leading toward it. The moon occasionally breaks through the heavy cloud cover, illuminating the dirt path. The terrain opens up to reveal the fortified settlement in the distance, with stone towers visible against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing over water to fortified settlement

events.description: stepping onto the wooden bridge over the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking across the wooden bridge toward the castle town gates

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge surface
wooden fence railings along the bridge edge
fortified stone entrance to the castle town

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps onto a long wooden bridge that stretches over the water toward the castle town. The bridge has wooden railings on both sides and weathered planks underfoot. The fortified stone buildings and gatehouse of the settlement grow larger as he approaches, with the moon casting reflections on the water below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate lakeside path that gradually leads toward the imposing silhouette of a medieval castle town. It begins with Geralt walking through open grassy hills under a moody blue-gray overcast sky, passing scattered pine and birch trees beside a calm lake. As the path curves, the terrain opens up to reveal a fortified settlement in the distance, with stone towers emerging against the dark sky as the moon occasionally breaks through the heavy clouds. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the dirt path and steps onto a long wooden bridge with weathered planks and railings. Finally, the camera advances across the water, where the moon casts reflections on the surface while the stone buildings and gatehouse of the town grow larger in the frame.
